glosses.ja: 画面; ディスプレイ

translations.en: The screen turns off by itself.
translations.de: Der Bildschirm schaltet sich von selbst aus.
translations.it: Lo schermo si spegne da solo.
translations.hi: स्क्रीन अपने आप बंद हो जाती है.
translations.nb: Skjermen slår seg av av seg selv.
translations.sv: Skärmen stängs av av sig själv.

tokens.explanation: Common noun, masculine singular, functioning as the subject; preceded by clitic definite article l' attached due to vowel onset.
Pronominal verb (with clitic se) in present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive meaning 'go off/turn off'.
Adverbial intensifier in the fixed expression 'tout seul', modifying the adjective.
Adjective, masculine singular; used adverbially/predicatively in 'tout seul' meaning 'by itself/alone'.

sentences.target: Je nettoie l'écran avec ce chiffon.

translations.fr: Je nettoie l'écran avec ce chiffon.
translations.en: I’m cleaning the screen with this cloth.
translations.es: Estoy limpiando la pantalla con este paño.
translations.de: Ich putze den Bildschirm mit diesem Tuch.
translations.it: Sto pulendo lo schermo con questo panno.
translations.pt: Estou limpando a tela com este pano.
translations.he: אני מנקה את המסך עם המטלית הזאת.
translations.vi: Tôi đang lau màn hình bằng chiếc khăn này.
translations.nl: Ik maak het scherm schoon met deze doek.
translations.hu: Ezzel a kendővel tisztítom a képernyőt.
translations.hi: मैं इस कपड़े से स्क्रीन साफ कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Καθαρίζω την οθόνη με αυτό το πανί.
translations.nb: Jeg rengjør skjermen med denne kluten.
translations.id: Saya sedang membersihkan layar dengan kain ini.
translations.sv: Jag rengör skärmen med den här trasan.
translations.da: Jeg rengør skærmen med denne klud.
translations.ja: この布で画面を拭いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
Present indicative, 1st person singular of 'nettoyer'.
Common noun, masculine singular, functioning as the direct object; preceded by clitic definite article l'.
Preposition introducing the instrument complement.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying 'chiffon'.
Common noun serving as the object of the preposition 'avec'.

sentences.target: Regarde l'écran pendant la mise à jour.
sentences.reading: /ʁə.ɡaʁd le.kʁɑ̃ pɑ̃.dɑ̃ la miz a ʒuʁ/

translations.fr: Regarde l'écran pendant la mise à jour.
translations.ipa: /ʁə.ɡaʁd le.kʁɑ̃ pɑ̃.dɑ̃ la miz a ʒuʁ/
translations.en: Watch the screen during the update.
translations.es: Mira la pantalla durante la actualización.
translations.de: Schau während des Updates auf den Bildschirm.
translations.ru: Смотри на экран во время обновления.
translations.pt: Olhe para a tela durante a atualização.
translations.vi: Hãy nhìn vào màn hình trong lúc cập nhật.
translations.nl: Kijk naar het scherm tijdens de update.
translations.uk: Дивись на екран під час оновлення.
translations.hu: Nézd a képernyőt a frissítés alatt.
translations.hi: अपडेट के दौरान स्क्रीन को देखो.
translations.el: Κοίτα την οθόνη κατά τη διάρκεια της ενημέρωσης.
translations.ro: Uită-te la ecran în timpul actualizării.
translations.cs: Dívej se na obrazovku během aktualizace.
translations.ja: 更新中は画面を見てください。

tokens.explanation: Imperative, 2nd person singular; direct command.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'Regarde', with clitic article l'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Definite article, feminine singular, modifying 'mise'.
Noun (deverbal of 'mettre'); part of the fixed expression 'mise à jour' meaning 'update'.
Preposition linking components of the expression 'mise à jour'.
Noun completing the multiword expression 'mise à jour' (update).

sentences.target: Nos yeux fatiguent devant l'écran le soir.

translations.fr: Nos yeux fatiguent devant l'écran le soir.
translations.en: Our eyes get tired in front of the screen at night.
translations.es: Nuestros ojos se cansan frente a la pantalla por la noche.
translations.de: Unsere Augen werden abends vor dem Bildschirm müde.
translations.it: I nostri occhi si stancano davanti allo schermo la sera.
translations.zh-Hans: 晚上对着屏幕时我们的眼睛会疲劳。
translations.yue: 夜晚對住個螢幕我哋嘅眼睛會攰。
translations.ru: Наши глаза устают перед экраном по вечерам.
translations.pt: Nossos olhos ficam cansados diante da tela à noite.
translations.he: העיניים שלנו מתעייפות מול המסך בערב.
translations.vi: Mắt chúng ta mỏi khi nhìn màn hình vào buổi tối.
translations.ar: عيوننا تتعب أمام الشاشة في الليل.
translations.nl: Onze ogen worden 's avonds moe voor het scherm.
translations.uk: Наші очі втомлюються перед екраном ввечері.
translations.hu: Este a képernyő előtt elfárad a szemünk.
translations.hi: रात में स्क्रीन के सामने हमारी आँखें थक जाती हैं.
translations.pl: Wieczorem nasze oczy męczą się przed ekranem.
translations.el: Τα μάτια μας κουράζονται μπροστά στην οθόνη το βράδυ.
translations.nb: Øynene våre blir slitne foran skjermen om kvelden.
translations.id: Mata kita menjadi lelah di depan layar pada malam hari.
translations.sv: Våra ögon blir trötta framför skärmen på kvällen.
translations.ro: Ochii noștri obosesc în fața ecranului seara.
translations.cs: Naše oči se večer unaví před obrazovkou.
translations.da: Vores øjne bliver trætte foran skærmen om aftenen.
translations.ja: 夜になると画面の前で目が疲れます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, plural, agreeing with 'yeux'.
Common noun, plural; irregular plural of 'œil'; subject of the sentence.
Present indicative, 3rd person plural; agrees with 'yeux'.
Preposition introducing the oblique complement 'l'écran'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'devant', with clitic article l'.
Definite article, masculine singular, introducing the time noun 'soir' to form a habitual temporal phrase.
Common noun used as a temporal complement ('le soir' = in the evening).
